title: galium parisiense subvar. anglicum
intro: Galium parisiense subvar. anglicum, also known as English bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Galium parisiense subvar. anglicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and folk medicine.
